# EHG Legal Entity

## Metadata

- **Category**: Reference
- **Status**: Approved
- **Version**: 3.0.0
- **Author**: EHG Wiki (generated)
- **Last Updated**: 2026-07-08
- **Tags**: ["ehg-wiki", "identity"]

EHG is the legal entity **ExecHoldings Global, LLC** (resolves the EHG acronym).

- Business address: 111 Town Square Pl Ste 1238, PMB 210836, Jersey City, NJ 07310-1810, US.
- EIN issued; EHG business bank account open.
- The LLC -> EIN -> banking legal chain is COMPLETE (chairman-attested 2026-07-04).
- Brand assets: `assets/brand/ehg-logo.png` (light) and `assets/brand/ehg-logo-dark.png` (dark, canonical by provenance). Logo wordmark reads "Exec Holdings Global" (three words); legal documents use the LLC form "ExecHoldings Global, LLC" (two words) — this is a deliberate brand-vs-legal spelling divergence, not an error.
- EIN and bank account numbers are deliberately NOT stored anywhere in this system.

Remaining first-dollar chain after the legal formation: product live -> funnel live -> flip Stripe to live mode (chairman-gated) -> first system-acquired customer.
